daily_locations.title: Daily visited locations
daily_locations.formula: f(N) = exp(-(ln N - mu)^2 / (2 sigma^2)) / (N sigma sqrt(2 pi))

warnings: YJMOB 1k-sample comparison data looks like timestamp-only panel observations; evaluation metrics were adapted by collapsing consecutive rows with the same H3 resolution 6 into stays (1228051 rows -> 431603 stays).
YJMOB 1k-sample has no explicit purpose column; derived HOME/WORK/OTHER with time-of-day and repeated-location heuristics.
